rationale: The "relaxing puzzle / hand-solves-traffic-jam" hook is fundamentally misaligned with aquapark.io's competitive, high-velocity slide-and-bump racing loop — selling "feel relaxed" would mis-set expectations and tank D1 retention from installs. Palette overlap (blue/orange) is coincidental; there's no water slide, no avatar, no overtaking action to showcase, and the casual puzzle audience only partially overlaps with the younger arcade-racer crowd. Skip this archetype for aquapark.io; if you want a "satisfaction" angle, build a bespoke variant around smooth slide lines, glider gaps, and last-second bump KOs instead.
